summary: Frontend e2e for VAT Invoice PDF download on /shop/trade/account passes 100%. Logged in as a seeded trade customer with 2 orders; verified Dashboard tab shows 2 icon-only download buttons (data-testid=download-vat-invoice-btn-{orderId}, empty text confirms icon-only), and Orders tab shows 2 labelled buttons 'Download VAT Invoice' (data-testid=download-vat-invoice-full-{orderId}). Both buttons trigger Playwright download events with the correct filename 'VAT_Invoice_INV-AA9AB1.pdf' (~2966 bytes). Magic bytes confirmed via fs read. Sonner toast 'Downloaded VAT_Invoice_INV-AA9AB1.pdf' displayed on success. After clearing tile_shop_token from localStorage, clicking surfaces 'Please sign in to download invoices' toast. Regression: Dashboard widgets (Discount Balance, Total Orders, Total Spent, Recent Orders, INV-* numbers) all render. View All chevron link present and navigates to Orders tab. Tier badges globally hidden (0 found via [data-testid*=tier-badge] / [class*=TierBadge]).
critical_code_review_comments: TradeAccountPage.jsx is 1555 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Should be split into smaller modules (Dashboard tab, Orders tab, Discount tab, Settings tab as separate components).

downloadOrderVatInvoice handler is correctly implemented with auth gate, blob conversion, document.createElement('a').click(), URL.revokeObjectURL cleanup, and toast id reuse for loading->success transition. No issues found.
test_credentials: Seeded ephemerally per-run via /app/backend/tests/seed_vat_ui_test.py (customer prefix vat-ui-*). Cleaned up after test.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 1 trade customer (T-VATUI01) + 2 delivered orders (INV-AA9AB1, INV-D0A5AB) with savings_meta — then deleted post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VAT Invoice PDF download verified on Dashboard quick-view and Orders tab. Both data-testid namespaces (download-vat-invoice-btn-{orderId} for icon-only, download-vat-invoice-full-{orderId} for labelled) work. PDF Content-Type/filename/size all OK. Auth-missing path gives correct error toast. Regression items (KPI widgets, View All chevron, tier-badge hidden) all clean. Note seed/cleanup scripts at /app/backend/tests/seed_vat_ui_test.py + cleanup_vat_ui_test.py for re-running.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All acceptance criteria satisfied.
